Wallet protection buffer
Fraud & chargeback buffer
Fraud & chargeback buffer

We hold a one-time ¥… safety buffer to cover any post-approval adjustments — disputed plans, bond corrections, reversed set approvals. It stays held until you have completed 3 sets; until then you can still withdraw anything earned above the buffer. Once you reach that, the buffer unlocks permanently and every later withdrawal can drain your wallet fully.

Max withdrawable now: ¥0. You have completed 0 set(s) so far — once you reach the target the buffer releases and everything becomes fully withdrawable.

Payment details
For commission payout
Payouts are sent instantly to your PayPay account. Enter your PayPay ID (or the phone number registered to PayPay) and the name on your PayPay account. Make sure the name matches your PayPay account — payouts to a mismatched account can be rejected.
PayPay payout · PayPay · 即時
Payouts are sent by Japanese yen bank transfer. Enter your bank details exactly as they appear on your passbook or cash card.
Bank transfer · Japan · ¥

    Welcome to Journey Junction
    A quick look at what you can do here.
    What is Journey Junction
    Journey Junction is a curated marketplace connecting travelers across Japan with skilled Japan inbound travel planners. You craft the itineraries, travelers enjoy the trip, and we handle the logistics behind the scenes.
    Your role as a planner
    You'll design personalized itineraries based on each traveler's brief, their pace, preferences, and must-sees. Every plan you build shapes someone's real journey across Japan.
    Tools you'll use
    Everything lives in one dashboard. Claim new assignments, track your active sets, build day-by-day itineraries, chat with support, and monitor your wallet, all in one place.
    We've got your back
    Support is one tap away for questions, revisions, or payment help. Admins review your work carefully and the planner community is here to share tips and encouragement whenever you need it.
    Plan 4 — itinerary form
    —
    ⚑
    Premium plan — refundable bond required.
    This is a high-priority premium plan — the traveler's flights and dates are already locked in, covering the accommodation, experiences, and transport you'll arrange. To confirm a committed, responsible approach, a refundable bond is required before you begin. Complete the plan by the deadline and pass review and approval, and the bond is refunded in full — and your reward is paid alongside it. If the deadline is exceeded, or the work is left unhandled, undelivered, or incomplete, the bond may become non-refundable to protect the plan.

    Update bank details in Profile → Payment
    Your full available balance is withdrawn in one go.
    Refundable bond required
    Complete the refundable bond to unlock this traveler's plan
    Why a refundable bond is required
    This is a premium plan — typically for a corporate client, large group, or high-budget traveler. The traveler's plans and bookings may already be locked in, so a late or incomplete delivery can disrupt their trip.
    The bond simply confirms you'll handle the work responsibly and on time. Once the plan is complete and passes review and approval, it's refunded in full.
    Key points
    • ✓Fully refundable — submit every plan in the set on time and, once approved, the bond is refunded in full.
    • ✓Your pay is issued separately — the bond is never deducted from your reward.
    • ✓If work is left unhandled, undelivered, or past the deadline, the bond may become non-refundable.
    How to complete the bond
    1
    Chat with support — we'll walk you through the amount, refund terms, bank details, and a reference code for matching your transfer.
    2
    Make the bond transfer and send support a screenshot of the completed transfer.
    3
    Once confirmed, your premium plan unlocks. Confirmation time can vary with our finance team's availability.
    Journey Junction Support
    We typically reply within an hour
